title: Podded Jungle Leaves
description: Leavesly jungle leaves with cocoa pods.
body:
# `Podded Jungle Leaves`
This resource pack add cocoa pods to [Leavesly](https://modrinth.com/mod/leavesly) jungle leaves.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/X8X5158DIG)

**Podded Jungle Leaves can also be installed by downloading it from the following:**

[![GitHub Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/ishikyoo/podded-jungle-leaves/total?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&color=F5F5F5)](https://github.com/ishikyoo/podded-jungle-leaves)
